reason: Check global RVV authority chain, Stage2 scope, common EmitC neutrality, and mirror non-authority rules.
Check compare/select provider facts, statement-plan ownership, target validator boundary, and required fail-closed behavior.
Check embedded runtime AVL/VL selected-boundary contract fields, target consumer order, and no-runtime-change evidence boundary.
Check focused C++/lit coverage, old-authority testing discipline, and ssh rvv rationale.
Check runtime contract migration remains plugin-local and avoids common/core RVV semantic branching.
Check runtime ABI/control work does not become high-level compute semantics or descriptor-driven behavior.
Check against the previous base-memory migration's verified implementation and evidence pattern.
